step_1_scanned_metadata.narrative_summary: The witness awoke paralyzed, seeing a light and a humanoid figure at his third-floor window. After the paralysis passed, he felt an inner urge to go to a deserted mansion where he encountered a group of humanoid beings with large crania and metallic eyes, near a landed craft. He then found himself reclining in a domed room, feeling calm as two glowing spheres flanked his head, and was reassured by the beings.

encounter_events.source_citation: The witness awoke in the night, unable to speak or Move
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness experienced paralysis and inability to speak upon waking, matching E315 (paralysis, numbness).

encounter_events.source_citation: a light shone into the rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: A beam of light immersed or shone upon the witness, matching U120 (beam of light immerses the witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: a huManoid figure looked in at the third-floor window
encounter_events.ai_justification: A humanoid being was observed at the window, matching B201 (humanoid).

encounter_events.source_citation: When the paralysis passed he dressed and went outside, guided by an inner urge onto the grounds of a deserted Mansion
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness acted on an irresistible inner urge without knowing why, matching E218 (predestination: act without knowing why).

encounter_events.source_citation: They had large crania
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings had large heads/crania, matching B230 (head large).

encounter_events.source_citation: large, seeMingly Metallic eyes recessed beneath the forehead
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings had large eyes, matching B241 (large size eyes).

encounter_events.source_citation: He saw a landed craft like a flying saucer nearby
encounter_events.ai_justification: The craft is described as a flying saucer, matching U100 (disk).

encounter_events.source_citation: He found hiMself reclining in a doMed rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness has no memory of the transition from outside to inside the craft, indicating doorway amnesia (E201).

encounter_events.source_citation: He found hiMself reclining in a doMed rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness was reclining, matching X155 (witness lies on an examining table or couch).

encounter_events.source_citation: a doMed rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The room is described as domed, matching U211 (domed).

encounter_events.source_citation: illuMinated with a white, hazy light
encounter_events.ai_justification: White hazy light without specific source matches U230 (bright and uniform, without specific source) combined with U251.

encounter_events.source_citation: illuMinated with a white, hazy light
encounter_events.ai_justification: The hazy quality of the light matches U251 (misty).

encounter_events.source_citation: the beings told hiM everything would be all right
encounter_events.ai_justification: The beings promised the witness would be safe, matching M100 (promise subject will be safe).

encounter_events.source_citation: he felt calM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The witness felt calm, matching E300 (pacification effect: witness calm, euphoric, relaxed).

encounter_events.source_citation: two glowing spheres flanked his head
encounter_events.ai_justification: Luminous globes flanked the witness's head, associated with the calming effect, matching E326 (luminous globe controls witness).

encounter_events.source_citation: He found hiMself reclining in a doMed rooM
encounter_events.ai_justification: The transition from outside to inside the craft with no memory implies a time lapse, matching E200 (time lapse).

encounter_events.source_citation: Again in 1979 he awoke paralyzed
encounter_events.ai_justification: A subsequent abduction event in 1979 matches A225 (further abductions).

encounter_events.source_citation: not remember him, he said
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being tells the witness to forget, consistent with M119 (beings tell subject to forget, because the time is not right).

encounter_events.source_citation: he could always find and recognize her
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being's claim that he can always find and recognize her implies long-term special interest in and surveillance of the witness, matching M122.

encounter_events.source_citation: he might take her at some later time to the other world he described
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being promises to return to the witness and take her to another world, matching M149.

encounter_events.source_citation: At some point he asked her permission to take a 'piece of her'
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being asks permission before taking a sample, showing considerate and helpful behavior consistent with B901.

encounter_events.source_citation: he asked her permission to take a 'piece of her' (blood sample?), which they needed for the sake of understanding
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being requests a body sample (likely blood), matching X235 (beings take a blood or body fluids sample).

encounter_events.source_citation: A tubular arm then cut her leg painlessly and stopped the bleeding
encounter_events.ai_justification: A tubular arm makes an incision on the witness's leg, matching X222 (beings make incision for unknown purpose).

encounter_events.source_citation: stopped the bleeding
encounter_events.ai_justification: The being stops the bleeding after the incision, implying easing of injury, matching X229.

encounter_events.source_citation: which they needed for the sake of understanding
encounter_events.ai_justification: The stated purpose of taking the sample is 'understanding,' implying interest in the witness's chemical composition or internal makeup, matching B711.
